summary: Completed comprehensive testing of footer and navigation link functionality. All reported issues have been resolved - footer Quick Links, Services, and brand logos are now clickable and route correctly.
passed_tests: Footer Quick Link 'Work With Me' navigates to /work-with-me
Footer Quick Link 'Tools & Resources' navigates to /meditations
Footer Quick Link 'Contact' scrolls to contact section on homepage
Footer Quick Link 'Client Portal' has correct external Zoho URL
Footer Service '1:1 Virtual Sessions' navigates to /work-with-me with virtual section
Footer Service 'Aura Cleansing' scrolls to services section on homepage
Footer 'Lightened Self' heading navigates to homepage hero
Navbar logo/brand navigates to homepage hero from any page
